title: Monkeying Around
description: This was a smallish fabric pack intended for use on our server that grew a bit bigger, including Create, Botania, some QOL Mods, and more.
body:
This Fabric pack was designed for use on the Monkeying Around Server, but would also make a fine single player pack. Includes Create, Botania, many performance/QOL mods as well as decorations, add-ons and more.










**Credit Section for Included mods that require it:**

Macaw's Windows by sketch_macaw: [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/macaws-windows](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/macaws-windows)
